changes.description: Baseline run with original verbose SKILL.md (297 lines). Both tasks scored 100/100.

Rewrote SKILL.md from 297 lines to ~50 lines. Removed all unreferenced support files (root-cause-tracing.md, defense-in-depth.md, condition-based-waiting.md, etc.) that the bare runtime cannot load. Cut process-heavy methodology prose. Added concise bug pattern table and race condition fix template. Maintained 100/100 on both tasks while reducing token cost ~85%.
